title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.183 - Epilepsy awareness month designated for the month of November
text:
9.183.  Epilepsy awareness month designated for the month of November. — The month of November shall be designated as "Epilepsy Awareness Month" in Missouri.  The citizens of the state of Missouri are encouraged to participate in appropriate activities and events to increase awareness of epilepsy and its related symptoms.
(L. 2015 H.B. 400)
